# Issue Templates

**Purpose:** Organize issue templates for Aletheore contributors.
**Status:** Placeholder
**Owner:** TODO
**Related Documents:** [../../CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md), [../../SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md), [../pull_request_template.md](../pull_request_template.md)

## Purpose

This directory contains issue templates for future project intake.

## Responsibilities

- Guide contributors toward useful issue reports.
- Separate bugs, proposals, documentation requests, and security-related guidance.
- Keep public issue intake aligned with governance.

## Future Contents

- Refined issue forms.
- Maintainer triage labels.
- Links to proposal workflows.

## Relationship to Other Directories

Issue templates route contributor input into `proposals/`, `docs/`, `standards/`, and future implementation areas.
